1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

<ul id="manual-list-wrap-ul"> <li class="archive-element"> <a aria-hidden="true" href="/nb-NO/fellesrad/trysil-kirkelige-fellesrad/aktuelt/middag%20p%C3%A5%20tvers%20v%C3%A5ren%202026/" tabindex="-1">
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (27 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Dette kan pengene bli brukt til:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

<svg fill="none" height="33" viewbox="0 0 32 33" width="32" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <g clip-path="url(#clip0_5802_5003)"> <path d="M22.667 9.34607H17.3337V12.0127H22.667C24.867 12.0127 26.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#333" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="m256-200-56-56 224-224-224-224 56-56 224 224 224-224 56 56-224 224 224 224-56 56-224-2
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (167 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

First heading is h2, should start with h1

Start your heading structure with h1

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/om-kirken/kontakt-oss/personvern/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'streetsearch' appears 2 times

id="streetsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="congregationsearch"

id="streetname"

id="streetnumber"

SERIOUS

id="code"

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (12 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="menu__link" href="/nb-NO/om-kirken/slik-styres-kirken/samisk-kirkeliv/" title="Samisk kirkeliv"> Samisk kirkeliv </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="menu__link" href="/nb-NO/church-of-norway/" title="Church of Norway"> Church of Norway </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

<input id="congregationsearch" name="congregationsearch" type="hidden" value="true"/>

<input autocomplete="off" class="search2024__input search2024__input-no-border" id="streetname" js-autocomplete-type="ElectionPage" name="streetname" placeholder="F.eks. Stamhusveien"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

<input autocomplete="off" class="search2024__input" id="streetnumber" maxlength="4" name="streetnumber" oninput="validateInputGatenr(event)" pattern="\d{0,4}" placeholder="F.eks. 1"/>

Råd og utvalg - Trysil kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/trysil-kirkelige-fellesrad/om-oss/r%C3%A5d%20og%20utvalg/
Avvik: 212 | Bestått: 117
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (167 avvik)

MODERATE

Link text is a URL

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (168 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

<a class="footer-link" href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/cf0065e1-cc1b-4a33-adf0-5d66460e484c" rel="noopener noereferrer" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/trysil-kirkelige-fellesrad/kalender/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'streetsearch' appears 2 times

id="streetsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

SERIOUS

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Kalender - Trysil kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/trysil-kirkelige-fellesrad/kalender/
Avvik: 219 | Bestått: 186
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Add href attribute or use a button element

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>

Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name (×18 across article pages)

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible (×16 across article pages)

SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order (×4 across article pages)

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://www.kirken.no/trysil
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://www.kirken.no/trysil --max-pages 13 --format html
